milestones.title: Web MVP Week 1 — Discovery & Design Gate
milestones.description: Product, data, legal, information architecture, and UI direction.

milestones.title: Web MVP Week 2 — Web Foundation
milestones.description: Rsbuild, Tailwind, app shell, static catalog, and quality baseline.

milestones.title: Web MVP Week 3 — Core Wiki
milestones.description: Homepage, explore, songs, packs, and related navigation.

milestones.title: Web MVP Week 4 — Game Encyclopedia
milestones.description: Partners, story, game topics, and content update workflow.

milestones.title: Web MVP Week 5 — Production Quality
milestones.description: Accessibility, performance, PWA, SEO, and security.

milestones.title: Web MVP Week 6 — Public Preview
milestones.description: Acceptance, GitHub Pages, release evidence, and community readiness.

milestones.title: Post-MVP — Platform Expansion
milestones.description: Runtime, analytics, replay, broader datasets, localization, and optional services.
